name: Abhishek Kumar Singh
title: Software Engineer
tagline: Frontend-Focused Full-Stack · React · Spring Boot · Mobile
introduction: Software engineer with 13+ years specializing in frontend architecture, performance optimization, and clean, maintainable engineering practices. I'm frontend-focused full-stack — I go deep on React, UI quality, testing, and accessibility, and ship end-to-end features across the stack including Spring Boot backends. At Personatech, I was part of the team that built Retail Meetup and Fintech Meetup (acquired by Hyve), then helped set up and build the event-tech SaaS platform now serving 10+ enterprise clients. Since 2023, the platform has powered 1M+ one-on-one meetings and $120M+ in additional revenue for clients. Also improved delivery speed by ~50% using AI workflows and raised frontend test coverage from near 0% to 40%. Previously built production fintech mobile apps at Nium/InstaReM.

skills.value: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, React Router, HTML5, CSS3

skills.heading: Frontend Architecture
skills.value: Component libraries, design systems, SPAs, SSR/PWA, performance optimization

skills.heading: Testing & Accessibility
skills.value: React Testing Library, Playwright, Jest, WCAG accessibility, unit & integration testing

skills.heading: DevEx & Practices
skills.value: CI/CD, developer tooling, code quality standards, Git, Agile/Scrum

skills.heading: Backend & Mobile
skills.value: Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, REST APIs, React Native, iOS/Android deployment

experience.subtitle: Event-tech SaaS — 10+ clients, 1M+ meetings, $120M+ client revenue since 2023
experience.roleLine: Software Engineer (Apr 2023 – Present) · Senior Software Engineer (Mar 2020 – Apr 2023)
highlights: Part of the team that built Retail Meetup and Fintech Meetup, vertical event networking products acquired by Hyve after strong market performance.
Helped set up and build the event-tech SaaS platform now serving 10+ enterprise clients; since 2023, powered 1M+ one-on-one meetings and $120M+ in additional client revenue.
Own shared React component library and UI patterns; increased frontend test coverage from near 0% to 40% with Playwright and React Testing Library.
Ship features end-to-end from Figma through React UI and Spring Boot APIs; mentor junior engineers on a task basis. Improved delivery speed by ~50% using AI workflows and automation.
Built and maintained InstaReM cross-border payments mobile app in React Native (iOS & Android).
Integrated PhonePe Switch micro app; implemented security hardening for sensitive financial flows.
Owned App Store and Play Store release cycles for InstaReM and Amaze card app.
Developed Smaken food-ordering SPA (React, React Router) for the Netherlands market.
Improved page speed via lazy loading and bundle optimization.
Built Immidi marketing dashboard in React and brand client apps in React Native.
Contributed to Node.js/Koa APIs and mobile app store deployments.
Shipped Bluff Party multiplayer card game (Unity3D) and browser-based poker games.
Published Legendary Strike HTML5 arcade game to the iOS App Store.
